opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My partner said I passed out in my sleep and was making horrible gasping noises. I feel fine now, just exhausted.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Partner was frightened by the episode overnight and wanted it checked, even though the patient feels back to normal now.

symptom_narrative.onset: overnight while asleep, witnessed by partner
symptom_narrative.duration: unresponsive episode with noisy breathing lasting about a minute, then about 10 minutes of feeling groggy/confused before feeling normal again
symptom_narrative.character: sudden loss of consciousness during sleep, partner describes loud gasping/noisy breathing during the episode
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: frightening for my partner to witness, but I don't remember any of it — I just feel tired now
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: single episode overnight, has not happened before
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing done, recovered on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feels generally unwell with a cold/sore throat and mild fever the last day or two; denies chest pain or feeling their heart racing before the event
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, first time anything like this has happened
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: was fully active and well the day before; currently just feels tired and a bit shaken

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some a few hours ago for the fever

family_history_as_reported.narrative: My brother died suddenly in his sleep when he was 30 — they never really explained why.

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: has had a mild cold/sore throat and low-grade fever over the last day or so

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: feels embarrassed/fine now and wants to downplay the event to go back to sleep; partner is the one pushing for review

communication_style.typical_message_style: brief, matter-of-fact answers; partner may add detail if included in the chat

objective_data_offered.timing: checked overnight around the time of the event
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported home thermometer reading, not clinician-measured
